description.ko: 진주빛 공간 속에서 에메랄드빛 막을 통해 흐르는 황금빛 넥타를 묘사한 유기적 생명체의 미시적 탐구.
description.en: A microscopic exploration of organic life, where golden nectar flows through emerald membranes in a pearlescent void.

prompt: An ultra-detailed cinematic 3D render of AURA-7, titled 'The Thalamic Tide.' A rhythmic, breathing network of #7FB069 emerald moss-membranes and #2D5A3D forest-green vascular filaments pulsating within a #E6F2E1 pearlescent liquid atmosphere. Flowing ribbons of #FFE66D golden bioluminescent nectar move like viscous liquid silk through semi-permeable cellular walls. Macro cinematography focus on the rhythmic pulsation of translucent capillary systems. Rendered in Octane with hyper-realistic fluid dynamics, volumetric light shafts, and extreme soft focus bokeh. 8k resolution, serene and divine movement.
